_note: FINAL full-protocol baseline. Supersedes baseline_libero_goal_prelim.json (n=6 pipeline probe, 83.33%). Raw eval output archived in baselineeval/eval_info.json.
hardware: Colab Pro+ L4 + High-RAM, background execution
interpretation: 85.0% vs paper 92%, vs independent LeRobot reproductions ~78-84%. One point above the reproduction band — within binomial noise at n=100 (95% CI ~ +/-7pts). No 0% task (floor 60%, tasks 0 and 9), ruling out key-mismatch / control-mode failure modes. This is the SFT/RL comparison baseline.
wall_time_note: 2.49 h total, ~90 s/episode at batch_size=4 on L4.
